name: libmodule-runtime-perl
title: libmodule-runtime-perl
summary: Perl module for runtime module handling
description:
Perl module for runtime module handling
Module::Runtime deals with runtime handling of Perl modules, which are normally
handled at compile time.
.
This module provide functions that can, for example, require or use modules at
runtime, check for module names validity, compose module names and more.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmodule-runtime-perl because Perl module for runtime module handling.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmodule-runtime-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmodule-runtime-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmodule-runtime-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
